name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that keeps your slides looking human, not machine-made.
problem: Generic AI presentation tools churn out cookie-cutter slides that look templated and lifeless, undermining credibility in professional settings. Chronicle 2.0 applies AI to speed up the creation process while enforcing design discipline that prevents the over-formatted, cluttered aesthetic common to AI-generated decks. This gives teams polished, distinctive presentations without the manual design overhead.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks that stand out from AI-generic competitors
Creating client-facing proposals and reports with consistent brand aesthetics
Producing internal strategy presentations quickly without a dedicated designer
Developing sales enablement materials that look crafted rather than auto-generated
